positive: A striking, symmetrical, and centralized abstract composition of stylized bioluminescent flora intertwined with intricate celestial constellation maps. The design must feature clean, powerful silhouettes and sharp geometric forms. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette dominated by deep indigo, midnight blue, neon cyan, and electric lavender, giving it a retro-futuristic, synthwave aesthetic. Vector graphic quality, perfect for large apparel prints, highly detailed linework, flat color blocking, minimalist, elegant, abstract, symmetrical art.
negative: blurry, messy, low detail, grain, noise, watermark, signature, text, words, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor quality, gradient wash, photo realism
